token_security.notes: Token format follows standard pattern. Store securely, never commit to code.

encryption_methods.notes: Telegram provides server-side encryption but not true end-to-end. Manual encryption recommended for sensitive data.

permission_controls.notes: Review user permissions and message access controls

api_key_security.notes: Verify API key permissions follow principle of least privilege

recommendations: Implement manual encryption for sensitive data
Never commit tokens to version control
